accepted.reason: Ray-sphere intersection math is a classic geometric kernel with clear optimization structure.

In-place FFT with bit-reversal and butterfly stages is a high-value algorithmic optimization target.
Growable numeric buffer logic captures useful memory-management style patterns for optimization tasks.
